title: Mar 3, 2026
summary: Fix direction gating and active-position quantity drift in BMC execution UI.

features.title: Show Orphan Active Risk Managers In Positions Panel
features.summary: Active Positions now includes active risk managers that are still open after strategy replacement events.
features.description: When a ticker is replaced from a single strategy to directional UP/DOWN while positions are already open, an older risk manager can remain active in execution telemetry and position_ledger but no longer appear in the current strategy.active_positions list. The Signals tab now merges unmatched active risk managers for the selected ticker into positionDetails so all open contracts are shown with live quote/PnL and close controls.

features.title: Enforce Direction Mode At Order Build
features.summary: Long Only mode now hard-blocks put entries (and Short Only blocks call entries).
features.description: Added a final direction gate in BigMoveConvexityStrategy._build_entry_order so configured direction_mode is enforced immediately before contract side selection. This prevents edge cases where transformed model signals could bypass intent and produce the wrong option side.

features.title: Active Positions Now Prefer Ledger Lots
features.summary: Signals tab now builds active lots from position_ledger runtime lots/fills to avoid doubled contract counts.
features.description: Position rendering now uses position_ledger as primary source and reconstructs lot rows from runtime_state.lot_entries (or entry fills fallback) before using in-memory active_positions. Group totals also dedupe shared risk-manager remaining_qty and trailing-state counts, preventing inflated xN displays after hot-swap/recovery.
